title: cliffortia polygonifolia var. polygonifolia
intro: Cliffortia polygonifolia var. polygonifolia, also known as Cliffortia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the southwestern and southern parts of Africa. Cliffortia has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Cliffortia is used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, and is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, often in combination with other herbs.
